title: Web-to-Cloud: MITRE Stage Breakdown
description: Sunburst-friendly rollup of the web-to-cloud chain by evidence source and threat label. It shows whether evidence is present across initial access, host, network, firewall, and cloud-control-plane telemetry.
query: ('Trace ID' = 'trace_w2c_entry_001' or 'Client IP' = '203.0.113.50' or 'Source IP' = '10.0.1.50' or 'Destination IP' = '198.51.100.77' or 'User Name' = 'compromised-svc@corp.example.com' or 'Threat Name' = 'Suspicious Data Exfiltration') | stats count as Events by 'Log Source', 'Threat Name' | sort -Events

ask_ai_prompts: Which MITRE-style stages have complete evidence coverage?
Which log source contributes most to each attack stage?
